cards.base: bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium shadow-sm transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-gray-700 border border-gray-200 hover:bg-gray-50 rounded-full px-4 py-2 font-medium

badges.momentum_high: bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border border-emerald-100 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
badges.momentum_low: bg-red-50 text-red-700 border border-red-100 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
badges.status_neutral: bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 border border-gray-200 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

inputs.search: bg-white border-gray-200 rounded-lg pl-10 pr-4 py-2 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary transition-all shadow-sm

universal_guidelines: Always use 'Manrope' for headings and 'Inter' for body text.
Do NOT use pure black (#000000). Use #111827 or #0F172A for darkest text.
Do NOT use gradients on text unless specifically for a 'Momentum' score highlight.
Interactive elements must have a hover state that lightens the background or adds a subtle border color shift.
Use data-testid attributes on ALL interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs).
Glassmorphism effects should be used sparingly: Only on the Sticky Header and Modal backgrounds.
Cards should not have inner dividers unless absolutely necessary. Use whitespace to separate content.

mission_control_specifics.visual_metaphor: Clear Cockpit. High signal, low noise.
mission_control_specifics.priority_indicators: Use 'Pulse' animations for urgent items (Orange/Red dots).
mission_control_specifics.data_density: High density allowed in 'Program Snapshot', but generous whitespace in 'Priority Alerts'.
